name: Navajo Green Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Pork shoulder, trimmed of fat
1/2 teaspoon Dried, ground Mexican chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the green chiles (from 2 16 oz cans) with bacon grease in a skillet over medium-high heat.
- Coat the meat thoroughly with flour before adding it to the hot grease.
- Brown and cook the meat evenly, removing it to a Dutch oven when done.
2. In the same skillet, sauté onions and garlic until translucent.
3. Add the sautéed vegetables, remaining ingredients (tomato paste, water, salt, spices), and the browned meat back into the Dutch oven.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients, then bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Once boiling, reduce heat to low and simmer for 45 minutes.
6. Taste and adjust seasonings as desired, then continue cooking for an additional 30 minutes.
